participants.name: Joanne Clark
participants.mostValuable: Combination of practical skills and realisation all in similar circumstances

participants.name: Judith Rebecca Hanlon
participants.location: Department for Child Protection - South Australia
participants.mostValuable: How to build on your skills and questions which help with self reflection
participants.general: I always enjoy your workshops and hope to see you all in Qld again soon.

participants.name: Liza Bingham
participants.mostValuable: Supporting people in this space is challenging

participants.name: Rei Sakimura
participants.mostValuable: I decided to get some old habits back. I think I have been overwhelmed with all the things I need to do. I had learned good techniques for work/life balance and combatting procrastination previously but stopped using them. Today's course was a very good reminder. Thank you very much.
participants.general: Very grateful to Dale Carnegie Institute for great courses.

participants.name: BT Yap
participants.general: Please share the speaker's presentation slides to yapbt@outlook.com.

participants.name: Naomi Gordon
participants.mostValuable: What I put in, I get out. I can appreciate that improving balance in particular areas that I have neglected more recently will help to move the dial positively in other areas. Thinking of my time as important as money was also a good gear shift.
participants.general: Great pace, excellent brain motivation for my lunch hour! Thanks

participants.name: Suman Maharjan
participants.mostValuable: Vision goal and action, time management and time robbers
